findings.location: s2 — tip about common.properties and env.properties
findings.description: The knowledge file uses the phrase "env.propertiesで上書きしたい場合は" (when you want to override with env.properties), but the source says "common.propertiesに記載されている値を環境毎に変えたい場合は" (when you want to change per environment). The word "上書き" (overwrite/override) does not appear in the source and subtly misrepresents the mechanism: "上書き" implies keeping the item in common.properties and adding it to env.properties as an override, whereas the source explicitly instructs "移動(カット＆ペースト)" — cutting from common.properties and pasting into env.properties (i.e., the item is removed from common.properties).
findings.source_evidence: 「common.propertiesに記載されている値を環境毎に変えたい場合は、項目をenv.propertiesに移動(カット＆ペースト)する。」(source tip under 環境ごとに環境設定値を切り替える方法)
